title: aruba-aos provider
description: Native ArubaOS-Switch (AOS-S) REST API v8 OpenTofu/Terraform provider. Replaces the net/switches/hpe scottwinkler/shell adapter so the switch imports to 0-diff. Not ArubaOS-CX (that has aruba/aoscx).

phases.title: Core (generic, full coverage)
phases.exit_criteria: Builds, vets, tests; one resource + data source cover all /rest/v8 paths.

items.feature: REST v8 transport (cookie login, GET/PUT/POST/DELETE, re-auth, logout, insecure TLS)
aruba_aos_object resource (CRUD + ImportState; PUT-upsert or POST-collection; DELETE/PUT-reset/NONE destroy)
Manage-declared-only drift: subset plan modifier (declared keys match device -> 0-diff; never clobbers unmanaged fields)

phases.title: Validate against live AOS-S
phases.exit_criteria: house-aruba-2530 resources import to 0-diff through the provider.

items.feature: Provider installable on the Semaphore runner (filesystem_mirror + scoped .terraformrc); tofu init verified (plan task 116: 139 add/0 change/0 destroy)
Live import to 0-diff proven: house-aruba-2530 imported + applied -> tofu plan = No changes (task 125)
Acceptance tests (TF_ACC) against a throwaway/lab AOS-S

phases.title: net/switches/hpe migration
phases.exit_criteria: module emits aruba_aos_object from native NetBox modeling; scottwinkler/shell retired; switch managed via Semaphore to 0-diff.

items.feature: required_providers + arubaos provider; vlan/vlan_port(tagged)/trunk_member/vlan_ip(OOB SVI)/stp converted to arubaos_object; shell_script + scripts/ removed. Validated; runner plan 139 add/0 change. (system hostname/gateway deferred — PUT /system whole-object replace would wipe the gateway)
Remaining feature resources (system/snmp/dns/ntp/syslog/lldp/dhcp-snoop/stp_port). No native NetBox schema yet -> need config_context modeling or typed sugar first
house-aruba-2530 onboarded to 0-diff via Semaphore: VLAN 58/81 created, OOB_NET SVI .8.72/26, HOME_HOSTS->58 (additive; VLAN 59 retained), renames applied. tofu plan = No changes

phases.title: Ergonomics + release
phases.exit_criteria: Optional typed sugar; CI; registry publish.

items.feature: Typed sugar resources (vlan, vlan_port, trunk, vlan_ip) over the generic core
CI (build/vet/test) + GoReleaser + registry publish + docs gen
